revision.comment: Newer CIA map of Japan = Japan Map CIA 2021.png
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Artanisen|wikipedia>Artanisen]]
Copying from [[Category:%1 from %2 2%3]] to [[Category:Locations to be reviewed]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{{subst:PAGENAME}}}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
